title: Chemical Bonding: Basics
subject: Chemistry
content:
# Chemical Bonding

Chemical bonding refers to the formation of a chemical bond between two or more atoms, molecules, or ions to give rise to a chemical compound.

## 1. Octet Rule
Atoms tend to gain, lose or share electrons to have eight electrons in their outer shell.

## 2. Types of Bonds
- **Ionic Bond:** Complete transfer of electrons.
- **Covalent Bond:** Sharing of electrons.
- **Coordinate Bond:** Special type of covalent bond where both electrons come from one atom.

## 3. VSEPR Theory
Predicts the geometry of individual molecules from the number of electron pairs surrounding their central atoms.
